source: Reverser has to be in neutral position to start the engine.
target: 换向手柄必须在空档位置才能启动发动机。

source: Set BS2 to Cutout and lock the key in the other cabin.
target: 将另一司机室内的BS2手柄设为切断位并锁住钥匙。

source: Start button must be held until engine starts and revs up to 480 rpm.
target: 必须按住启动按钮直至发动机启动并升速至480转/分。

target: 必须启动发动机才能驾驶此列车
